author: bainbrid
body:
This PR back ports the 2020Nov28 model from master to the V01-01-XX branch for integration into the 10_6_X cycle, as required by this PR: https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/33589

This PR adds the `LowPtElectrons_ID_2020Nov28.root` weights file, in addition to the existing `LowPtElectrons_ID_2020Sept15.root` weights file. 

The latter file is already in use by the run2_miniAOD_UL modifier for the ongoing UL re-miniAOD campaign. 

The former file is to be enabled by the bParking modifier to used during the UL re-RECO of the BParking data sets.
title: LowPtElectrons: add 2020Nov28 model for 10_6_X
